parameterdescription.para: Waiting period to lock the device, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The current thread does not own the device lock.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint16_t reg, uint32_t val)
memberdef.name: eth_adin2111_reg_write

briefdescription.para: Writes host MAC interface register over SPI.

simplesect.para: Shall not be called from ISR.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint16_t reg, uint32_t *val)
memberdef.name: eth_adin2111_reg_read

briefdescription.para: Reads host MAC interface register over SPI.

simplesect.para: Shall not be called from ISR.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint16_t reg, uint32_t mask, uint32_t data)
memberdef.name: eth_adin2111_reg_update

briefdescription.para: Update host MAC interface register over SPI.

simplesect.para: Shall not be called from ISR.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask for bits that may be modified.
Data to apply in the masked range.

briefdescription.para: Reset both the MAC and PHY.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for device lock. Shall not be called from ISR.

detaileddescription.para: Note that PHY 1 must be out of software power-down for the MAC subsystem reset to take effect.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for device lock. Shall not be called from ISR.

briefdescription.para: Enable/disable the forwarding (to host) of broadcast frames.

detaileddescription.para: Frames who's DA doesn't match are dropped.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for device lock. Shall not be called from ISR.

parameterdescription.para: Set to 0 to disable and to nonzero to enable.
struct net_if pointer, or NULL on error.
